title: rectangular tags for non-button labels in dashboard
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Round means click
gist.blurb: We finally decided that making everything a pill shape was confusing. Now, round things are buttons you can click, and rectangular things are tags you can read. Groundbreaking UI science.
gist.summary: Replaced round informational badges with rectangular tags across the dashboard to establish a clearer visual hierarchy.
gist.impact: Users can now instantly distinguish between interactive buttons and static informational labels without having to hover over them.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot sorting UI shapes. The bee holds a round button, while the robot stacks crisp rectangular tags. Represents the visual distinction between buttons and labels.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot sorting glowing UI elements. The bee wears a tiny painter's beret and holds a round button, while the robot stacks crisp rectangular tags. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.
